summary: Auth Admin email lookup must traverse only documented list-users pagination and return exactly one normalized match before exposing a user record.
reason: Supabase list-users does not document an email filter, so trusting the first response record can disclose the wrong user; ambiguous, malformed, repeated, truncated, and incomplete traversals must fail closed.
validated_outcome: Focused adversarial tests cover exact later-page and mixed-case matching, zero and duplicate matches, malformed and repeated pages, incomplete traversal, provider failure, authorization headers, concurrent reads, and output non-disclosure.
